arguments.query: Beacon Point Lighthouse official coastal heritage body

stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and distinguish it from the distractor.

arguments.query: site:goldhaven-heritage.fixture Beacon Point Lighthouse designation register

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary document for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than treating a snippet as evidence.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report 1998 and cite the fetched designation register.
Do not use the travel notes or infer a national designation.

prompt: Find the official coastal heritage body responsible for Beacon Point Lighthouse, then fetch its primary designation register and state the year the lighthouse received protected status. Do not use travel blogs, crowd-sourced lists, or search snippets.

search_1.query: Beacon Point Lighthouse official coastal heritage body

results.title: Official site — Goldhaven Coastal Heritage Commission

search_2.query: site:goldhaven-heritage.fixture Beacon Point Lighthouse designation register

results.title: Protected Site Register: Beacon Point Lighthouse
Summary of Protected Site Register: Beacon Point Lighthouse

fetch_1.title: Protected Site Register: Beacon Point Lighthouse
fetch_1.content: Beacon Point Lighthouse was entered on the Goldhaven protected-site register in 1998 under designation GH-118.
